channel.title: David Linacre Blog
channel.description: Practical engineering notes on interface systems, frontend theming, delivery quality, and cloud caching.

item.title: Dynamic HSL Theme Customization in React
item.description: How to build a theme customization panel using CSS custom properties, HSL color calculations, and local storage preservation.
item.author: david@linacre.site (David Linacre)

item.title: Optimizing Vercel Edge CDN Caching Headers
item.description: Enforcing cache invalidation rules, immutable assets, and s-maxage controls to build a blazing fast, globally cached SPA.
item.author: david@linacre.site (David Linacre)
